title: UFC Fight Night: Della Maddalena vs. Prates

posts.author: Tapology
posts.body: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: SWRS
posts.body: Predictions: 13 of 13 Pending | Tied for 1st with 1434 others Della Maddalena vs. PratesJack Della Maddalena, TKO, R4Jdm is gonna dominate this fight this is a nightmare matchup for prates if he let Ian Garry get in range imagine what is gonna happen when jdm gets into range

posts.author: humble
posts.body: Predictions: 1 of 13 Pending | Tied for 1st with 1434 others Della Maddalena vs. PratesCarlos Prates, TKO, R2WE all want JDM to win but I think Prates is just too dangerous. The knees and leg kicks are gonna be here and stifle a lot of JDM's game. I think Garry had the much better physical attributes to implement a gameplan against Prates and even then he was on his ass crawling around in the 5th. Prates' volume has only been getting better since then and his power can't be overstated.

posts.author: KMPdoesUFC
posts.body: Predictions: 1 of 13 Pending | Tied for 1st with 1434 others Look this is a sick fight and amazing matchmaking on the UFC's part after a rocky first start to the year, this is an amazing fight night, but my issue is that if Carlos Prates beats JDM he is 100% the number 1 contender and a title shot would be next for Prates, however if JDM gets the job done and solidifies a defence, how likely is it that he's gonna get a rematch over Islam or if by some miracle the champ is Ian Garry by then, my point is invalid.

posts.author: Xion
posts.body: Predictions: 13 of 13 Pending | Tied for 1st with 1434 others Dariush vs. SalkilldQuillan Salkilld, TKO, R1Damn man. I love Beneil Dariush bro why we gotta do this to unc. Literally being sacrificed here.Tuivasa vs. SharafTai Tuivasa, TKO, R1SURELY THIS IS A FREE BAM BAM WIN SURELYElliott vs. ErcegSteve Erceg, DECGreat fight and decent matchmaking for once in the UFC this fight actually makes sense. I'm picking Erceg to pretty comfortably win this fight. Outboxes and out grapples Tim Elliot and shows he is high level once again. I know I KNOW Ode Osbourne rocked his **** but tbf he hits really hard and Stevey has a sus chin but still he ate it and beat his ass. I think Erceg's gonna have an answer for everything Elliot's gonna throw at him.Malkoun vs. MeerschaertJacob Malkoun, TKO, R2**** Malkoun looked incredible in his last fight. Watched that one in person and HE SHOULD'VE GOTTEN A ******* BONUS. Anyway it doesn't matter because paramount doesn't care about the athletes or the sport even. Malkoun chins GM3 and looks like a world champion in the process. Dude looks in peak form right now and i like him getting a few good wins and potentially moving up in the rankings soon.Tafa vs. ChristianJunior Tafa, TKO, R1Kevin Christian should not be in the UFC right now. Tbf neither should Junior Tafa but he is pretty good on the feet and KO's most unranked guys. Like this one. R1 KO for The Juggernaut. Almost had his moment against Elekana in Sydney but the Tafa bros cant grapple to save their lives and it's very unfortunate.Rowston vs. BryczekCam Rowston, TKO, R3Great fight i feel like we haven't seen Bryczek in a while. Cam Rowston is a nasty mfer and has a clean fighting style and actually looks for the finish. Active on the feet and can defend a takedown and looks like he definitely knows what he's doing on the ground. TKO for Cam Rowston later in the fight R2 or 3. Finds the range later on when Bryczek gasses deeper into the fight.Steele vs. Mar FanDom Mar Fan, TKO, R3Damn i just KNOW this is FOTN. These ******* guy are gonna go to war bro i can't wait. Dom Mar Fan really impresses me with the improvements he's made in his game recently and he shows so much championship mettle and potential. Kody Steele has some gritty and nasty boxing and just wants to tough it out with you and DMF is 100% more than happy to oblige. I think i like him better in the one just because he'll have an outside speed advantage and is more technical with his striking setups and has some solid defence and a ******* iron chin to go with it. I like a TKO in the fight against the fence late for Street Buddha just because of Steele's reckless nature and he'll get a bit gassed and DMF will take over by the 2nd round. R3 TKO for Dom Mar Fan. I guarantee this fight will be a certified hood classic.

posts.author: CUZZ
posts.body: Predictions: 13 of 13 Pending | Tied for 1st with 1434 others Rowston is not the finisher people think he is. I think if he wins, it's a decision. He is a point fighter who has happened to find finishes vs low-level comp, and even so, they are late round wins and subs vs guys with bad grappling * Edited at 03.25.2026, 2:10 AM ET *

posts.author: Goat******76
posts.body: Predictions: 11 of 13 Pending | Tied for 1st with 1434 others Sweet Mary Mother of ******* Christ…I have seen some utterly repugnant, heinously anus matchmaking in the UFC before, but seeing Tai Tuivasa vs Sean Sharaf as an honest-to-god real fight feels like an April Fools joke that’s a week premature. For some indescribable reason, the UFC wants to cling their hands to Tai’s pudgy waist so desperately that they not only dismiss his loss streak entirely as a very concrete reason to justifiably cut him from the roster, they gave him Sean ******* Sharaf. Sean is not a can, he the can of cans, the slobbiest of heavyweight slobs. He’s the equivalent of the fat chick in the group of popular mean girls in a high school: he exists solely to make other people look better. If a UFC contender’s skillset could be compared to an IRL profession, he is the skill equivalent of a **** set **** mopper. To go from fighting Cyril Gane to a human sceptic tank is such an embarrassing drop in quality competition wise that if I were in Tai’s shoes (preferably not the ones filled with ******* Blue Moon) I would hang up the gloves, immediately. GOD ******* FORBID he loses this fight somehow. He needs this more than Ben Shapiro needs a pack of tampons. Tai via hopefully R1 KO * Edited at 03.25.2026, 8:11 PM ET *

posts.author: A_Person_05
posts.body: Predictions: 13 of 13 Pending | Tied for 1st with 1434 others Dariush vs. SalkilldQuillan Salkilld, TKO, R1Dariush has no chin anymore. Moicano dropped him bad. BSD lightly tapped him on the temple and he died. Arman knocked him out with a shot on one foot. Salkilld has big power, range, grappling defense, etc. Against Moicano Dariush won by outpointing him with kicks, and reversing grappling exchnages into advantageous positions. Salkilld isn't gonna get outpointed with kicks, he isn't going to shoot bad takedowns because he is losing at kickboxing. He will keep it on the feet and hit Dariush with something that turns him off.Tuivasa vs. SharafTai Tuivasa, TKO, R1If you lost to a Tafa get out of the sport. Even Tai maybe wins this. Who cares?Elliott vs. ErcegSteve Erceg, DECErceg out pointing his way to a decision. Erceg can't beat these elite FLW strikers, and also can't outgrapple them, but he can outsrike the mid FLW grapplers and use his counter grappling and wrestling to keep it standing or reverse positions.Malkoun vs. MeerschaertJacob Malkoun, TKO, R1Meerschaert is done. It's over. Be happy that it happened, not sad that it is over. It was magical. I really hope he has one more come from behind late round submission in his bag. I just watched his last fights, and it's over.Tafa vs. ChristianKevin Christian, DECTafa sucks.Rowston vs. BryczekCam Rowston, TKO, R1Rowstan is good Bryczek is not.Steele vs. Mar FanKody Steele, SUB, R2Kody Steele my WAsian goat. This will be a banger, it's a sleeper matchup. Here is what I think it comes down to, Fan is not a finisher, every Road fight was a decision. Steele finishes people or dies trying, and I don't think Fan can put him out. Steele also has an insane BJJ background but scraps on the feet (think Gregory Rodrigues), I think he hurts Fan on the feet and then subs him on the ground.Micallef vs. GorimboJonathan Micallef, TKO, R1Micallef is good... Gorimbo... is not.Gaziev vs. PeričićShamil Gaziev, DECGaziev title walk ensuing.Thicknesse vs. MoralesColby Thicknesse, DECTo be clear Thicknesse is not good. He got overrated to all hell by Aussie fans and delusional haters that claimed he beat Topuria Sr. With all that said feeding him Morales is a nice way to get him a win before he loses to someone else.Schultz vs. JohnstonBen Johnston, TKO, R2Didn't watch Schultz on DWCS, watched the fight where Pinas busted shots all over him, Schultz looked like **** and got walked over. Looked like middleweight Ryan Hall, but specifically the Ryan Hall that fought Topuria.Jenkins vs. RahikiJack Jenkins, DECJenkins is really good, he hits the legs constantly, he has solid boxing, and he has nasty combinations. Rahiki looked good in his debut, if he wins this I am on the hype train, but Jenkins has such a unique combination of skills I think its a really tough matchup for someone's second UFC fight.

posts.author: zeddhero
posts.body: Predictions: 13 of 13 Pending | Tied for 1st with 1434 others Della Maddalena vs PratesPick: Jack Della by DecisionJack Della Maddalena is a very, very, very good fighter and I think too many are forgetting how skilled he is because of that Islam fight. Yes, Islam wrestle-f*cked him the whole fight, yes, Islam got the better of some of the striking exchanges as well, but here Prates isn't even going to try to exploit some of Jack's weakeness on the ground. If anything, I think Jack may intiate some of the grappling exchanges later on. Prates has power with that left straight, he's put so many fighters out with it, but this is the type of fight Jack is made for. His top tier boxing, head movement, combos and IQ is going to shine big here, I could honestly see a masterclass from him here. These two have granite chins (especially Jack omfg) so doubt either man finishes the other, but Jack is going to have more moments and more strikes landed in order to win this one. Can't wait for him to remind the fans just how good he is.Dariush vs. SalkilldPick: Beneil Dariush by DecisionI get Salkilld is very very good and is a very promising prospect, but after seeing some of the trends lately in the LW division, and how good Moicano looked against Duncan. I'm starting to think there's still levels to this ****. Dariush's chin is made of glass for sure, but this guy's grappling and wrestling is still very slick, and rewatching some of the exchanges with BSD, he did land a couple of good shots before he got dropped and put out. If Salkilld doesn't put Benny away early, Benny is going to take over and show how valuable his experience truly is. I do like Salkilld a lot, perhaps my favorite LW prospect and this is a semi-favorable matchup, but I just think Benny is gonna win the grappling exchanges and outlast Salkilld to win a 29-28. * Edited at 04.05.2026, 10:42 AM ET *

posts.author: McFarlanders
posts.body: Predictions: 13 of 13 Pending | Tied for 1st with 1434 others Dariush decYeah sure, his chin is now composed mostly of styrofoam, but he’s a crafty man. The only reason he’s 1-3 in his last four is because his opponents have decent or huge power in their hands. Oliveria and Tsarukyan are the cream of the crop of LW, no shame in losing to them. BSD is a marauder who has nasty hands, a LOT of people would get colded had BSD not have the throwing speed of a slug. So what does Salkilld have in order to beat Benny? A finish over the Indian (look at him, he looks chinny), the Israeli (thats all I know abt him), and Nasrat (a decent win that is his best win). But Salkilld is going against the man who schooled Gamer man Gamrot and Money Moicano, two other crafty vets. I think its too early for Salkilld, as he’s someone I don’t think has the power to KO Benny nor has the skills to outgame him. Henceforth, it will be a Benny win by 30-27, 30-27, 29-28 Unanimous decision.

posts.author: CherylReacts
posts.body: Predictions: 11 of 13 Pending | Tied for 1st with 1434 others Rowston vs. BryczekRobert Bryczek, TKO, R3i think byrczek will dissapoint a lot of aussies if cam rowston can survives i can see a possible decision going his way but his gas tank comes with questions and i he has a bad tendency of dropping his hands when people rush at him with big strikes (city kickboxing tendency). Bryczek will slump himSteele vs. Mar FanDom Mar Fan, DECthis is gonna be a banger. kody steele has heavy hands and is pretty reckless but fun to watch his brawler wrestler style, but dom mar fan is far more technical all 3 rounds and holds an advantage on the feet and a huge advantage in the clinch and both of these guys throw nasty clinch strikes. sub for dom mar fan is live and there is always a punchers chance for steele. gimme the fan fave guy in a banger fight but clear 30-27 for the aussie sideMicallef vs. GorimboJonathan Micallef, SUB, R3micallef is a dope prospect i love his game and he will show levels against gorimbo who is decent through 3 minutes of the fight but gets pretty gassed post grappling while micallef looks pretty good through 3 rounds for a younger guy and i think his main issue is that he doesnt grapple enough for as good as he is at is. luckily for him, gorimbo loves to shoot sorry ah takedownsGaziev vs. PeričićShamil Gaziev, DECi think brando is legit, but this is too much too soon in my opinion, poeple forget how good of a grappler shamil gaziev is and has finished people on the ground at the highest level. gaziev is just way more polished and he is live to last in a 3 round match if he controls the pace hes very good at selecting his strikes * Edited at 04.16.2026, 10:06 PM ET *

posts.author: CherylReacts
posts.body: Predictions: 11 of 13 Pending | Tied for 1st with 1434 others Thicknesse vs. MoralesVince Morales, SUB, R3morales is underrated man, i thought he beat elijah smith who fights a similar more technical style than thickness who forgets about the little things on the feet, he is pretty good on the ground but i definitely think morales is more dangerous and thats why i think he will catch a sloppy third round colby on the ground in a savvy submission but i can see colby surviving and winning a robbery or sum.

posts.author: CherylReacts
posts.body: Predictions: 11 of 13 Pending | Tied for 1st with 1434 others Jenkins vs. RahikiJack Jenkins, SUB, R3marwan rahiki is another one of my favorite prospects but he is a reckless kickboxing style sometimes and loses his technique on the feet over the course of rounds, jack jenkins is a calm crisp muay thai style that provides heavy power in the kicks and has the tools to limit rahikis game. jenkins also has an advantage on the ground and is live to mount rahiki or take the back at some point and i think he will find a finish against a fatigued rahiki. but both fighters have a punchers chance. stay away from this fight if you gambling :)
